{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Karoshan refugees
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Karoshan refugees]] are inside [[Shadow Ark]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c15">''The Pilot'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
